en.title: EM Twin · The Electromagnetic Layer of the Digital Twin

fields.Headline: EM Twin
fields.Headline-em: The Invisible Pillar of the Digital Twin
fields.Sub: Backed by the dual foundation of Lauraycs ray tracing channel and hardware-in-the-loop (HIL), it builds a real-time, evolvable EM twin of the electromagnetic environment. It is both the infrastructure for end-to-end testing and the key link that feeds electromagnetic data back into city/factory/low-altitude digital twins—closing the RT loop with reality so it becomes new environmental data once again.

items.title: Headline
items.text: EM Twin

items.title: Headline-em
items.text: The Invisible Pillar of the Digital Twin

items.title: Sub
items.text: Backed by the dual foundation of Lauraycs ray tracing channel and hardware-in-the-loop (HIL), it builds a real-time, evolvable EM twin of the electromagnetic environment. It is both the infrastructure for end-to-end testing and the key link that feeds electromagnetic data back into city/factory/low-altitude digital twins—closing the RT loop with reality so it becomes new environmental data once again.

table.Label: Full-stack testing from environment to DUT
Reality ↔ simulation ↔ reality data feed back

sections.label: The Missing Link in the Digital Twin
sections.heading: Challenge · The Missing Link in the Digital Twin

fields.Title: Why the Digital Twin Lacks an "Electromagnetic Layer"
fields.Description: City, campus, factory, and low-altitude digital twin projects are emerging in droves, but the vast majority stop at the geometry and IoT-sensing layers. The moment wireless network planning, ISAC, low-altitude C2, satellite coordination, or intelligent-driving communication is involved, a missing "electromagnetic layer" means the twin cannot support end-to-end communication testing or strategic decision-making.

table.Title: Geometry ≠ Electromagnetics
table.Text: Existing digital twins only describe what is "visible," and are virtually blind to the reflection, diffraction, penetration, and time-varying multipath of electromagnetic waves.

table.Title: Broken Reality Feedback
table.Text: Coverage, interference, and packet-loss data from real networks cannot be fed back into simulation, leaving reverse calibration and optimization out of reach.

table.Title: No Foundation for End-to-End
table.Text: Without a continuously online electromagnetic environment that devices can access, end-to-end testing for autonomous driving / low-altitude / industrial use can only be fragmentary.

fields.Title: Turn the Electromagnetic World into a "Continuously Online" Twin Platform
fields.Description: The EM-Twin platform uses Lauraycs ray tracing as its electromagnetic kernel, overlays real-time data from live networks/factories/low-altitude/satellite-ground, and remains continuously visible to real terminals through its HIL subsystem. It is not a one-off simulation, but an electromagnetic environment service that can be subscribed to, queried, and driven.

table.Title: Continuously Online
table.Text: 7×24 real-time EM field service; geographic scope, frequency band, and time are all subscribable; supports event-triggered replay.

table.Title: Drivable
table.Text: Directly drives hardware such as channel simulators, UAV C2 test benches, and satellite simulators via API/Streaming.

table.Title: Data Closed Loop
table.Text: Live-network/drive-test/factory operational data is fed back; measured calibration continuously improves twin fidelity, forming a bidirectional closed loop.

fields.Title: The Four-Layer Architecture of the EM Twin
fields.Description: From low-level environment data acquisition, to electromagnetic kernel computation, to outward-facing service interfaces, and on to integration with the upper-layer digital twin, it forms a complete EM twin platform. Every layer provides standard APIs.

table.Title: Multi-Source Environment Data
table.Desc: OSM / BIM / oblique photography / laser point cloud / real-time IoT; aligned with city/factory digital twin base maps.

table.Title: RT Electromagnetic Kernel
table.Desc: Lauraycs ray tracing continuously computes time-varying multipath and coverage; GPU clusters scale elastically.

table.Title: Service-Oriented API
table.Desc: gRPC / REST / Streaming; subscribe to the electromagnetic state of a specified geographic box or time window.

table.Title: Upper-Layer Applications and Feed Back
table.Desc: Network planning, ISAC, low-altitude, autonomous driving, HIL, AI training; real-world data is fed back for continuous calibration.

table.Spec: Lauraycs cluster deployment; multi-GPU/multi-node parallelism; compute units partitioned by geographic box
Static coverage: second-level; dynamic multipath: ≤ 100 ms local refresh; triggerable millisecond-by-millisecond replay
gRPC, REST, WebSocket Streaming, Kafka data streams
OSM / CityGML / IFC (BIM) / LAS point cloud / oblique photography; custom integration
Live-network KPIs (RSRP, SINR, RSRQ, CQI), drive-test PCAP, IoT sensing, vehicle/UAV trajectories
Already supports city-level, campus-level, factory-level, and low-altitude management (UTM) digital twin platforms
3D EM field visualization (coverage, shadowing, beams, multipath); timeline replay; event timeline
Automatically produces labeled multipath/sensing/positioning datasets, usable for ISAC/AI-native algorithm training
Private cloud / edge / self-controllable cluster (including ARM); supports tenant isolation and compute billing
Data classification, access control, audit logs; supports MLPS and industry compliance
Kylin / domestic GPU adaptation; the self-controllable stack runs end-to-end

fields.Filling the electromagnetic gap: Truly "completes" the electromagnetic dimension of the digital twin, rather than statically pasting coverage maps as textures.
fields.Drivable: Not just for viewing—it can serve as a channel source to drive HIL/OTA real-hardware testing.
fields.Real-world closed loop: Measured data is continuously fed back, so twin fidelity converges over time rather than decaying.
fields.Subscribable electromagnetic service: Allows third-party applications to subscribe to the electromagnetic state via API, with the twin serving as public infrastructure.
fields.Cross-domain base maps: City, campus, factory, low-altitude, and satellite-ground twin systems can all be unified on a single electromagnetic kernel.
fields.AI data factory: Outputs large-scale labeled datasets to support ISAC / 6G AI-native channel and positioning model training.

items.title: Filling the electromagnetic gap
items.text: Truly "completes" the electromagnetic dimension of the digital twin, rather than statically pasting coverage maps as textures.

items.title: Drivable
items.text: Not just for viewing—it can serve as a channel source to drive HIL/OTA real-hardware testing.

items.title: Real-world closed loop
items.text: Measured data is continuously fed back, so twin fidelity converges over time rather than decaying.

items.title: Subscribable electromagnetic service
items.text: Allows third-party applications to subscribe to the electromagnetic state via API, with the twin serving as public infrastructure.

items.title: Cross-domain base maps
items.text: City, campus, factory, low-altitude, and satellite-ground twin systems can all be unified on a single electromagnetic kernel.

items.title: AI data factory
items.text: Outputs large-scale labeled datasets to support ISAC / 6G AI-native channel and positioning model training.

table.Title: Smart City
table.Text: Coordinated planning of 5G private/public networks, electromagnetic situational rehearsal for major events, and emergency communication simulation.

table.Title: Factory Digital Twin
table.Text: Industrial 5G LAN / Wi-Fi 7 deployment optimization, communication link assurance for AGVs and collaborative robots.

table.Title: Low-Altitude Management
table.Text: UTM platform integration with EM-Twin, situational awareness for urban low-altitude C2/video links and route planning.

table.Title: Integrated Satellite-Ground Network
table.Text: Joint planning of LEO constellation coverage and ground shadowing, NTN service-level KPI prediction.

table.Title: Intelligent Driving Road Network
table.Text: End-to-end electromagnetic testing and strategy validation for roadside RSU/MEC and vehicle-side coordination.

table.Title: AI / 6G Training
table.Text: Large-scale, high-fidelity channel and sensing data for AI-native channel models and algorithm training.

table.Label: City-level/campus-level EM twin projects in deployment
Joint validation with operators, equipment vendors, automakers, and low-altitude operators
Continuously onboarding more base maps and data sources

zh-CN.title: 电磁孪生 · 数字孪生的电磁层

fields.Eyebrow: 产品策略三层结构 · 第三层
fields.Headline: 电磁孪生
fields.Sub: 在 Lauraycs 射线跟踪信道与硬件在环 HIL 的双重支撑下，构建实时、可演化的电磁环境孪生体。它既是端到端测试的基础设施，也是把电磁数据回灌进城市/工厂/低空数字孪生的关键一环——让 RT 闭环到现实，再次成为新的环境数据。

items.title: Badge
items.text: Datasheet · L3 / EM Digital Twin

items.title: Eyebrow
items.text: 产品策略三层结构 · 第三层

items.title: Headline
items.text: 电磁孪生

items.title: Headline-em
items.text: 数字孪生的隐形支柱

items.title: Sub
items.text: 在 Lauraycs 射线跟踪信道与硬件在环 HIL 的双重支撑下，构建实时、可演化的电磁环境孪生体。它既是端到端测试的基础设施，也是把电磁数据回灌进城市/工厂/低空数字孪生的关键一环——让 RT 闭环到现实，再次成为新的环境数据。

table.Label: 从环境到 DUT 全栈测试
现实 ↔ 仿真 ↔ 现实的数据回灌

sections.label: 数字孪生缺失的一环
sections.heading: Challenge · 数字孪生缺失的一环

fields.Title: 数字孪生为何缺一个"电磁层"
fields.Description: 城市、园区、工厂、低空数字孪生项目层出不穷，但绝大多数停留在几何与物联感知层。一旦涉及无线网络规划、ISAC、低空 C2、卫星协同、智能驾驶通信，缺失"电磁层"就意味着孪生体无法支撑端到端通信测试与策略决策。

table.Title: 几何 ≠ 电磁
table.Text: 已有数字孪生只描述"看得见的"，对电磁波的反射、绕射、穿透与时变多径几乎不可见。

table.Title: 现实反馈断链
table.Text: 真实网络的覆盖、干扰、丢包数据无法回灌仿真，反向校正与优化无从谈起。

table.Title: 端到端缺基础
table.Text: 没有持续在线、可被设备访问的电磁环境，自动驾驶/低空/工业的端到端测试只能片段化。

fields.Title: 把电磁世界变成"持续在线"的孪生平台
fields.Description: EM-Twin 平台以 Lauraycs 射线跟踪为电磁内核，叠加来自现网/工厂/低空/星地的实时数据，并通过 HIL 子系统对真实终端持续可见。它不是一次性仿真，而是一个能被订阅、被查询、被驱动的电磁环境服务。

table.Title: 持续在线
table.Text: 7×24 实时电磁场服务；地理范围、频段、时间均可订阅；支持事件触发回放。

table.Title: 可被驱动
table.Text: 通过 API/Streaming 直接驱动信道仿真仪、UAV C2 测试台、卫星仿真器等硬件。

table.Title: 数据闭环
table.Text: 现网/路测/工厂运行数据回灌；实测校正持续提升孪生体保真度，形成双向闭环。

fields.Title: 电磁孪生的四层架构
fields.Description: 从底层环境数据采集，到电磁内核计算，到对外服务接口，再到与上层数字孪生的对接，构成完整电磁孪生平台。每一层均提供标准 API。

table.Title: 多源环境数据
table.Desc: OSM / BIM / 倾斜摄影 / 激光点云 / 实时 IoT；与城市/工厂数字孪生底图对齐。

table.Title: RT 电磁内核
table.Desc: Lauraycs 射线跟踪持续运算时变多径与覆盖；GPU 集群弹性扩展。

table.Title: 服务化 API
table.Desc: gRPC / REST / Streaming；订阅指定地理盒子或时间窗口的电磁状态。

table.Title: 上层应用与回灌
table.Desc: 网络规划、ISAC、低空、自动驾驶、HIL、AI 训练；现实数据回灌持续校正。

table.规格: Lauraycs 集群部署；多 GPU/多节点并行；按地理盒子划分计算单元
静态覆盖：秒级；动态多径：≤ 100 ms 局部刷新；可触发的逐毫秒回放
600 MHz – 100 GHz（可选 sub-THz 扩展）
OSM / CityGML / IFC（BIM）/ LAS 点云 / 倾斜摄影；自定义对接
现网 KPI（RSRP、SINR、RSRQ、CQI）、路测 PCAP、IoT 传感、车辆/UAV 轨迹
已支持城市级、园区级、工厂级、低空管理（UTM）数字孪生平台
3D 电磁场可视化（覆盖、阴影、波束、多径）；时间轴回放；事件时间线
自动产出标注的多径/感知/定位数据集，可用于 ISAC/AI-native 算法训练
私有云 / 边缘 / 国产化集群（含 ARM）；支持租户隔离与算力计费
数据分级、访问控制、审计日志；支持等保与行业合规
麒麟 / 国产 GPU 适配；信创栈端到端可运行

fields.电磁层填空: 真正"补齐"数字孪生的电磁维度，而非把覆盖图静态贴图。
fields.可被驱动: 不只是看，更可作为信道源驱动 HIL/OTA 真实硬件测试。
fields.现实闭环: 实测数据持续回灌，孪生保真度随时间收敛而非衰减。
fields.可订阅的电磁服务: 允许第三方应用通过 API 订阅电磁状态，孪生作为公共基础设施。
fields.跨域底图: 城市、园区、工厂、低空、星地多种孪生体系可统一在一个电磁内核上。
fields.AI 数据工厂: 输出大规模标注数据集，支撑 ISAC / 6G AI-native channel 与定位模型训练。

items.title: 电磁层填空
items.text: 真正"补齐"数字孪生的电磁维度，而非把覆盖图静态贴图。

items.title: 可被驱动
items.text: 不只是看，更可作为信道源驱动 HIL/OTA 真实硬件测试。

items.text: 城市、园区、工厂、低空、星地多种孪生体系可统一在一个电磁内核上。

items.title: AI 数据工厂
items.text: 输出大规模标注数据集，支撑 ISAC / 6G AI-native channel 与定位模型训练。

table.Title: 智慧城市
table.Text: 5G 私网/公网协同规划，重大事件电磁态势预演与应急通信仿真。

table.Title: 工厂数字孪生
table.Text: 工业 5G LAN / Wi-Fi 7 部署优化，AGV、协作机器人通信链路保障。

table.Title: 低空管理
table.Text: UTM 平台与 EM-Twin 联动，城市低空 C2/图传链路态势与航线规划。

table.Title: 星地一体网络
table.Text: LEO 星座覆盖与地面阴影联合规划，NTN 业务级 KPI 预测。

table.Title: 智能驾驶路网
table.Text: 路侧 RSU/MEC 与车端协同的端到端电磁测试与策略验证。

table.Title: AI / 6G 训练
table.Text: 大规模高保真信道与感知数据，用于 AI-native 信道模型与算法训练。

table.Label: 落地中的城市级/园区级电磁孪生项目
与运营商、设备商、车厂、低空运营方的联合验证
持续接入更多底图与数据源
